name: Chicken Curry Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Olive oil (reduced from 1/4 cup in original recipe)
1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken-breast halves, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 package Green Giant Harvest Fresh (9 oz)
2 packages Green Giant Rice Originals (10 oz)
2 cups Cooked white and wild rice mixture
1 Red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oil and onion in a 2-quart casserole; cover with lid or vented plastic wrap.
2. Microwave on high for 2 minutes.
3. Add chicken, water, curry powder, salt, and pepper; re-cover.
4. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on medium-high (70%) for 5 minutes, or until chicken is no longer pink.
5. Add peanuts, chutney, coconut, currants, and frozen mixed vegetables; re-cover.
6. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 6 minutes, or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
7. Let stand covered.
8. Prepare rice according to package microwave directions.
9. Spoon rice onto serving platter; top with chicken mixture.
10. Garnish with pepper strips.
